title.zh: 高校教师 | 能源-环境-AI交叉研究
title.en: Faculty Member | Energy, Environment and AI

affiliation.zh: 某某大学 某某学院

eyebrow.zh: 能源 · 环境 · 人工智能

headline.zh: 智能能源与环境系统研究

summary.zh: 面向低碳转型，我的研究关注能源系统优化、环境数据智能分析与可信人工智能方法，旨在为低碳城市、清洁能源和可持续基础设施提供可解释、可部署的计算工具。
summary.en: For low-carbon transitions, my research integrates energy systems optimization, environmental data intelligence and trustworthy AI to build interpretable, deployable tools for clean energy and sustainable infrastructure.

zh: 我是一名高校教师，长期关注能源、环境与人工智能交叉领域的问题。研究工作以真实系统中的数据、机理和决策约束为出发点，探索能够服务低碳转型和环境治理的智能方法。
当前研究包括多能源系统建模与优化、环境感知数据挖掘、时空预测、可信机器学习以及面向政策和工程应用的智能决策支持。欢迎具有能源工程、环境科学、数据科学、人工智能等背景的学生和合作伙伴交流。
en: I am a faculty member working at the intersection of energy, environment and artificial intelligence. My research starts from real-world data, physical mechanisms and decision constraints, with the goal of supporting low-carbon transitions and environmental governance.

Current topics include multi-energy system modeling and optimization, environmental sensing analytics, spatiotemporal forecasting, trustworthy machine learning and intelligent decision support for policy and engineering applications.

availability.zh: 欢迎本科生、研究生以及跨学科合作伙伴联系交流。
availability.en: Students and interdisciplinary collaborators are welcome to get in touch.
